channel.title: Enterprise Security on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise Security on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: commandline: Microsoft Scout: From personal project to enterprise-ready personal agent
item.description:
Microsoft Scout is described as an always-on personal AI agent that moved from a personal project into an enterprise-ready, secure product. The article is a discussion with Omar Shahine and Jakob Werner about the design and build process.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog

item.title: security: Applying security fundamentals to AI: Practical advice for CISOs
item.description:
Microsoft Security published guidance for CISOs on securing AI systems by applying established security fundamentals to AI-powered environments. The post focuses on practical steps for managing AI risk rather than introducing new product features.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: Governing AI agent behavior: Aligning user, developer, role, and organizational intent
item.description:
The report discusses how to govern AI agent behavior by aligning user, developer, role, and organizational intent for secure enterprise AI adoption.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
